title: This AI dashboard gives you ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more — for a flat $60
content_html:
TL;DR: Get ChatPlayground AI Unlimited for $59.97 today only and compare 20+ AI models with unlimited messages in one workspace.

Credit: ChatPlayground AI

$59.97
$619 Save $559.03

If you’ve ever copied the same prompt into three different AI tools just to see which one gives the best answer, you’re not alone. Different models excel at different things — but juggling tabs and subscriptions gets old fast. 

ChatPlayground AI puts the top AI models in one place, so you can compare responses side by side without the back-and-forth. Until 11:59 p.m. PT tonight, a lifetime subscription is on sale for $59.97.

GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, Gemini, DeepSeek, Llama, Perplexity, and more — all in one clean interface. It’s built for people who iterate fast, test variations, and actually care about optimizing results.

Beyond comparisons, ChatPlayground AI includes prompt engineering tools to refine outputs, image and PDF chat for context-aware responses, saved chat history for ongoing projects, and AI image generation powered by leading models. There’s even a Chrome extension to integrate it directly into your browsing workflow.

The Unlimited Plan means unlimited messages per month, making it ideal for startups, product teams, marketers, and prompt engineers who run experiments nonstop. You also get priority support and early access to new features and future models.

If you’re already paying for multiple AI tools — or constantly switching between them — this consolidates everything into one streamlined platform.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Grab lifetime access to ChatPlayground AI Unlimited for $59.97 through tonight — July 19 — at 11:50 p.m. PT and stop juggling models for good.

StackSocial prices subject to change.

content_html_zh:
TL;DR：立即购买 ChatPlayground AI Unlimited，只需 59.97 美元，即可在一个工作区中比较 20 多个具有无限消息的 AI 模型。

图片来源：ChatPlayground AI

$59.97
$619 Save $559.03

如果您曾经将相同的提示复制到三个不同的人工智能工具中，只是为了看看哪一个给出了最佳答案，那么您并不孤单。 不同的模型擅长不同的事情——但同时处理标签和订阅很快就会过时。

ChatPlayground AI 将顶级 AI 模型放在一个位置，因此您可以并排比较响应，而无需来回。 直至晚上 11 点 59 分 太平洋时间今晚，终身订阅特价为 59.97 美元。

GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet、Gemini、DeepSeek、Llama、Perplexity 等 — 全部都在一个干净的界面中。 它是为那些快速迭代、测试变化并真正关心优化结果的人而构建的。

除了比较之外，ChatPlayground AI 还包括用于优化输出的提示工程工具、用于上下文感知响应的图像和 PDF 聊天、为正在进行的项目保存的聊天历史记录以及由领先模型提供支持的 AI 图像生成。 甚至还有一个 Chrome 扩展程序可以将其直接集成到您的浏览工作流程中。

无限制计划意味着每月无限的消息，使其成为初创公司、产品团队、营销人员和不间断运行实验的提示工程师的理想选择。 您还可以获得优先支持并尽早使用新功能和未来型号。

如果您已经购买了多种人工智能工具——或者不断地在它们之间切换——这会将所有内容整合到一个简化的平台中。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

截至今晚（7 月 19 日）晚上 11:50，即可以 59.97 美元的价格终身使用 ChatPlayground AI Unlimited。 PT 并停止玩弄模型。

StackSocial 价格可能会发生变化。
